introSection: Red Fire is a steel launched roller coaster located at ViaSea in Tuzla, Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey. It is the second Intamin LSM-launched roller coaster in the city of Istanbul, Turkey.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a clone of iSpeed at Mirabilandia in Italy.

fullText:
Red Fire is a steel launched roller coaster located at ViaSea in Tuzla, Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey. It is the second Intamin LSM-launched roller coaster in the city of Istanbul, Turkey.

The ride is a clone of iSpeed at Mirabilandia in Italy.
